issue: The mobile sidebar toggle button is not visible on screens smaller than 768px in the student dashboard.

timeline.detail: Selecting candidate files based on issue keywords.
Selected 8 file(s): admin/admin-theme.css, admin/boxicons.min.css, admin/includes/header.php, admin/includes/navbar.php, admin/local-icons.css, admin/logs/log.css ...
Reading bounded snippets from candidate files.

result.summary: Mobile sidebar toggle button not visible on small screens due to missing CSS styling
result.explanation: The mobile-menu-btn lacks specific styles in the mobile media query (max-width: 768px), causing it to inherit potentially incorrect or missing styles. The button may be hidden or unstyled on small screens.
result.root_cause: Missing CSS rules for .mobile-menu-btn in the mobile media query (max-width: 768px) in admin/style.css
checks: Verify button visibility after applying CSS changes
fix_options: Add targeted CSS for .mobile-menu-btn in the mobile media query
tradeoffs: Minimal CSS change required, no functionality impact
notes: Ensure material-symbols CSS is properly loaded for icon visibility
Test with actual device viewport sizes

raw:
{
  "summary": "Mobile sidebar toggle button not visible on small screens due to missing CSS styling",
  "explanation": "The mobile-menu-btn lacks specific styles in the mobile media query (max-width: 768px), causing it to inherit potentially incorrect or missing styles. The button may be hidden or unstyled on small screens.",
  "root_cause": "Missing CSS rules for .mobile-menu-btn in the mobile media query (max-width: 768px) in admin/style.css",
  "fix_options": ["Add targeted CSS for .mobile-menu-btn in the mobile media query"],
  "tradeoffs": ["Minimal CSS change required, no functionality impact"],
  "risk": "low",
  "checks": ["Verify button visibility after applying CSS changes", "Test on devices <768px"],
  "patch_preview": "Add .mobile-menu-btn styles in @media (max-width: 768px) block",
  "target_file": "admin/style.css",
  "improved_code": "@media (max-width: 768px) {\n  .mobile-menu-btn {\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 4px;\n    padding: 8px 12px;\n    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);\n    color: #fff;\n    border-radius: var(--radius-md);\n    cursor: pointer;\n  }\n}",
  "notes": ["Ensure material-symbols CSS is properly loaded for icon visibility", "Test with actual device viewport sizes"]
}
